name: White Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 medium potato, peeled and chopped, 1.5 sticks
1 can cannellini beans, drained and rinsed, 19 oz.
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the broth and potato in a saucepan; bring to boil.
2. Reduce heat; simmer until potatoes are very tender (about 15 minutes).
3. Drain the mixture.
4. Mince the garlic using a food processor.
5. Add the potatoes and remaining ingredients to the food processor.
6. Process until smooth.
7. Serve with pita bread or spread on fresh or toasted slices of a crusty baguette.
